articles.title: Cipla Q1 results: Profit falls 39% YoY to  ₹789 crore; revenue climbs 3.50%
articles.excerpt: Cipla's Q1FY27 profit fell 39.2% YoY to ₹789.05 crore. On a quarter-on-quarter basis, profit increased by 42.3%. Revenue from sale of products for the quarter rose 3.50% YoY and 9.5% QoQ to ₹7,077.02 crore.
articles.summary: Cipla's Q1FY27 profit fell 39.2% YoY to ₹789.05 crore. On a quarter-on-quarter basis, profit increased by 42.3%. Revenue from sale of products for the quarter rose 3.50% YoY and 9.5% QoQ to ₹7,077.02 crore.
